I was at work and I'm circling back around to respond. They declined to talk, and I cant really blame them. I was even told they attempted to talk to you directly about the shit talking/your 'venting' and they didnt get a response— Thus why the post was even made.

data.author: did:plc:i6q25lqsukqq5fo3pkmgyygz

data.body:
perspective, you acted like an ass. Lets take that it was lewd out of the equation or that it was even a female character, or even an RP at all. 

Someone asked you something to keep in line with YOUR comfort and you okay'd it. It is YOUR responsibility to communicate those boundaries.

data.body:
And rather than confirm or communicate at any time it WASNT okay, you bad mouthed them. You made them seem like a bad person who was intentionally harming you, and they aren't.

data.author: did:plc:i6q25lqsukqq5fo3pkmgyygz

data.body:
their best to make you comfortable, a friend to them, a valued mutual— and to their knowledge, they were! Only for you to turn around and harm them when they had YOUR best interests in mind. 

Its okay to not want to write adult themes outside of close trusted friends, but its not okay to be

data.body:
I'm listening to some historical things today...

It never stops to amaze me that the reason the Confederate States tried to secede from the United States is because they thought there was a flaw in the government. Being that "All men are created equal." And that was so radical an idea that they
data.author: did:plc:q7tftbgxh63bfyjcfkxdj2qk

data.body:
had to break away from the United States of America.

But also, we are constantly having to fight for the equality of all since. It never stopped.

I mean I was taught when I was a kid it had. But even that was a tactic to pacify white people from thinking there was still a problem.
data.author: did:plc:q7tftbgxh63bfyjcfkxdj2qk

data.body:
It will never not stop to amaze me that there are people in this world that truly believe "they" are above the rest of us because of "fill in the blank reason." The reason doesn't matter, it's never a good reason.

I want equality for all. I will never not want it for all.
data.author: did:plc:q7tftbgxh63bfyjcfkxdj2qk
